programme.title: A Little Game
programme.desc: Seorang gadis muda yang sedang mencari jati dirinya di kota dan dalam hidupnya melalui pelajaran catur. Cerita ini juga tentang bersikap terbuka terhadap semua petunjuk mengenai hidupmu dan pilihan-pilihan yang mengelilingimu setiap hari.

programme.title: Space Racers
programme.desc: Bergabunglah bersama para murid di Stardust Space Academy saat mereka menjalani berbagai misi untuk mempelajari fakta-fakta baru sambil bersenang-senang. Ditemani karakter-karakter yang menarik dan menyenangkan, termasuk pemimpin Space Racers dan Hawk.

programme.title: Pil's Adventures
programme.desc: Seorang gadis muda pemberani menyamar sebagai seorang putri untuk menyelamatkan kerajaan dan pewaris takhta.

programme.title: 24 Hours With Diplo
programme.desc: Diplo adalah sosok paling menarik yang sering terlewatkan di karpet merah. Dia punya lesung pipit! Dia punya celetukan-celetukan jenaka! Dan mungkin yang paling penting dari semuanya, dia punya gaya yang pas.

programme.title: 24 Hours With BTS In L.A.
programme.desc: sebagai fenomena K-pop global dalam kunjungan besar-besaran pertama mereka ke Los Angeles, di mana grup beranggotakan tujuh orang ini disambut oleh kerumunan penggemar yang antusias dan sorotan media yang gencar. Pada suatu malam langka di akhir perjalanan kilat mereka tepat setelah AMAs, dan sebelum tampil di acara Ellen, para anggota grup naik bus pesta bersama Vogue dan mengguncang kota tersebut.

programme.title: 73 Questions, Ashley Graham
programme.desc: Ashley menceritakan bagaimana ia bertemu suaminya, produk apa yang benar-benar tak bisa ia tinggalkan, serta bagaimana ia bepergian ke dan dari Fashion Week tanpa repot berkat Lexus yang menyediakan layanan transportasi gratis bagi para desainer, model, editor, pengecer, dan profesional industri sebagai sponsor otomotif resmi New York Fashion Week.

programme.title: 73 Questions, Ashley Graham
programme.desc: Ashley menceritakan bagaimana ia bertemu suaminya, produk apa yang benar-benar tak bisa ia tinggalkan, serta bagaimana ia bepergian ke dan dari Fashion Week tanpa repot berkat Lexus yang menyediakan layanan transportasi gratis bagi para desainer, model, editor, pengecer, dan profesional industri sebagai sponsor otomotif resmi New York Fashion Week.

programme.title: Lost Souls: The Return
programme.desc: “The Return” adalah single kedua dari album “Lost Souls”.

programme.title: 24 Hours With Winnie Harlow
programme.desc: Model terkenal Winnie Harlow membagikan rahasia kecantikan di rumah dan cara yang tepat untuk menikmati sirsak dalam cuplikan eksklusif tentang rutinitas santainya ini. Saksikan saat Winnie melakukan panggilan FaceTime dengan Tory Lanez, menikmati buah-buahan khas Jamaika, dan bermain Cadoo hingga larut malam.

programme.title: 73 Questions With Donatella V.
programme.desc: Seri “73 Pertanyaan” dari Vogue kembali hadir, menampilkan Donatella Versace di apartemen mewahnya di Milan.

programme.title: 73 Questions, Anna Wintour
programme.desc: Mulai dari kata yang paling tidak disukainya dalam dunia mode hingga alasan mengapa ia selalu mengenakan kacamata hitam Chanel, Pemimpin Redaksi Vogue membagikan 73 hal yang membuatnya menjadi Anna Wintour.

programme.title: Home Again
programme.desc: Kehidupan seorang ibu tunggal di Los Angeles berubah secara tak terduga ketika dia mengizinkan tiga pria muda untuk tinggal bersamanya.

programme.title: 73 Questions, Camila Cabello
programme.desc: Selama berada di pedesaan Inggris, penyanyi keturunan Kuba-Amerika Camila Cabello menjawab 73 pertanyaan kilat. Sambil memetik gitar, Camila bercerita tentang proses penulisan lagunya dan antusiasmenya untuk memerankan versi terbaru Cinderella.

programme.title: 24 Hours With Maisie Williams
programme.desc: Bintang Game of Thrones, Maisie Williams, bertekad untuk menikmati Paris Fashion Week sepenuhnya. Dengan mengenakan busana yang serasi bersama pacarnya, Reuben Selby, Maisie menghadiri peragaan busana Thom Browne dan Givenchy.

programme.title: 50 Cent Answers The Webs...
programme.desc: Bintang film *Den of Thieves*, 50 Cent, menjawab pertanyaan-pertanyaan yang paling banyak dicari di internet tentang dirinya. Apakah 50 Cent pernah kuliah? Apakah 50 Cent seorang miliarder? Apakah 50 Cent orang Jamaika?? 50 Cent menjawab semua pertanyaan ini dan masih banyak lagi!

programme.title: Minor Premise
programme.desc: Saat mencoba melampaui warisan ayahnya, seorang ilmuwan saraf yang tertutup menjadi terjerat dalam eksperimennya sendiri, dengan mengadu sepuluh fragmen kesadarannya satu sama lain.

programme.title: 24 Hours With Maisie Williams
programme.desc: Bintang Game of Thrones, Maisie Williams, bertekad untuk menikmati Paris Fashion Week sepenuhnya. Dengan mengenakan busana yang serasi bersama pacarnya, Reuben Selby, Maisie menghadiri peragaan busana Thom Browne dan Givenchy.

programme.title: Lost Souls: The Return
programme.desc: “The Return” adalah single kedua dari album “Lost Souls”.

programme.title: 24 Hours With Winnie Harlow
programme.desc: Model terkenal Winnie Harlow membagikan rahasia kecantikan di rumah dan cara yang tepat untuk menikmati sirsak dalam cuplikan eksklusif tentang rutinitas santainya ini. Saksikan saat Winnie melakukan panggilan FaceTime dengan Tory Lanez, menikmati buah-buahan khas Jamaika, dan bermain Cadoo hingga larut malam.

programme.title: 73 Questions With Cardi B
programme.desc: Bintang hip-hop ternama Cardi B mengajak Vogue mengunjungi apartemen neneknya di New York City dan menjawab 73 pertanyaan bertubi-tubi. Sambil menidurkan putrinya, Kulture, Cardi B berbincang tentang hubungannya dengan Offset, ketertarikannya pada politik, album terbarunya, serta kondisi terkini hak-hak perempuan.

programme.title: 24 Hours With Diplo
programme.desc: Diplo adalah sosok paling menarik yang sering terlewatkan di karpet merah. Dia punya lesung pipit! Dia punya celetukan-celetukan jenaka! Dan mungkin yang paling penting dari semuanya, dia punya gaya yang pas.

programme.title: 50 Cent Answers The Webs...
programme.desc: Bintang film *Den of Thieves*, 50 Cent, menjawab pertanyaan-pertanyaan yang paling banyak dicari di internet tentang dirinya. Apakah 50 Cent pernah kuliah? Apakah 50 Cent seorang miliarder? Apakah 50 Cent orang Jamaika?? 50 Cent menjawab semua pertanyaan ini dan masih banyak lagi!

programme.title: 73 Questions With Gigi Hadid
programme.desc: Supermodel Gigi Hadid memiliki jadwal yang padat dengan penerbangan dan pemotretan. Di sela-sela perjalanannya dari New York ke LA, Gigi mengundang Vogue ke kantor IMG, tempat ia mencoba menjawab 73 Pertanyaan. Gigi menceritakan siapa idola perempuannya, memamerkan keahlian tinjunya, dan menyusun daftar lagu-lagu Taylor Swift favoritnya.

programme.title: 24 Hours With Rapper YG
programme.desc: Ikuti YG saat ia membagi waktunya antara membuat musik, mengelola lini busananya, dan menjalankan tugas sebagai ayah, semuanya dalam satu hari yang padat.

programme.title: Ninja: Shadow Of A Tear
programme.desc: Casey telah menetap di dojo ninja Koga dan menikahi Namiko, yang sedang mengandung anak pertama mereka. Suatu hari, saat berbelanja liontin di kota, dia bertemu dan menangkis dua perampok berpisau.

programme.title: Ninja: Shadow Of A Tear
programme.desc: Casey telah menetap di dojo ninja Koga dan menikahi Namiko, yang sedang mengandung anak pertama mereka. Suatu hari, saat berbelanja liontin di kota, dia bertemu dan menangkis dua perampok berpisau.

programme.title: 73 Questions, Greta Gerwig
programme.desc: Aktris, pembuat film, dan sutradara film Barbie, Greta Gerwig, menjawab 73 pertanyaan kilat sambil berjalan-jalan santai di Sony Pictures Studios. Dengan pemahaman mendalam tentang seperti apa kehidupan sebagai penulis skenario dan sutradara, Greta menjelaskan secara rinci segala hal yang terlibat dalam proses pembuatan filmnya dan menatap masa depannya di industri ini

programme.title: 73 Questions With Emily R.
programme.desc: Model dan aktris Emily Ratajkowski membuka pintu apartemen loft bergaya artistiknya di Los Angeles untuk sesi permainan catur, pesta mendengarkan piringan hitam, dan sesi menggambar dadakan.

programme.title: Lost Souls: The Return
programme.desc: “The Return” adalah single kedua dari album “Lost Souls”.

programme.title: 73 Questions, Esther Perel
programme.desc: Psikoterapis terkenal dunia, Esther Perel, cukup sibuk di masa-masa sulit ini. Kini, lebih dari sebelumnya, orang-orang sedang mencari cara untuk menyeimbangkan kehidupan mereka.

programme.title: 73 Questions With Dan Levy
programme.desc: Bekerja sama dengan Google Nest: Dan Levy, pencipta dan bintang serial TV populer Schitt's Creek, mengundang Vogue ke rumahnya yang diterangi cahaya hangat dan menjawab 73 pertanyaan kilat. Sambil didampingi sahabat setianya, Redmond, aktor yang pernah dinominasikan untuk Emmy ini berbincang tentang hubungannya dengan ayahnya, kecintaannya pada Jepang, serta betapa ia (dengan bangga) menikmati segelas cosmopolitan dengan es batu

programme.title: Fat man
programme.desc: Sinterklas yang gaduh dan tidak ortodoks berjuang untuk menyelamatkan bisnisnya yang sedang menurun. Sementara itu, Billy, seorang anak berusia 12 tahun yang terabaikan dan dewasa sebelum waktunya, menyewa pembunuh bayaran untuk membunuh Sinterklas setelah menerima sebongkah batu bara di kaus kakinya.

programme.title: 24 Hours With BTS In L.A.
programme.desc: sebagai fenomena K-pop global dalam kunjungan besar-besaran pertama mereka ke Los Angeles, di mana grup beranggotakan tujuh orang ini disambut oleh kerumunan penggemar yang antusias dan sorotan media yang gencar. Pada suatu malam langka di akhir perjalanan kilat mereka tepat setelah AMAs, dan sebelum tampil di acara Ellen, para anggota grup naik bus pesta bersama Vogue dan mengguncang kota tersebut.

programme.title: Alien Rubicon
programme.desc: Sejumlah bola asing mendarat di planet Bumi dan dengan mudah menghancurkan segala sesuatu yang dilewatinya. Kini, seorang ilmuwan dan Presiden Amerika Serikat harus mencari cara untuk menghentikan invasi alien tersebut.

programme.title: The Ballad Of Lefty Brown
programme.desc: Seorang Barat yang mendebarkan dan penuh aksi, The Ballad of Lefty Brown adalah kisah tentang kesetiaan, persahabatan, dan upaya tanpa henti untuk mencapai keadilan.

programme.title: Alex Of Venice
programme.desc: Seorang pengacara gila kerja dipaksa untuk menemukan kembali hidupnya setelah suaminya tiba-tiba pergi.

programme.title: Sinister Tales: The Haunting
programme.desc: Sekelompok teman berkumpul untuk saling menceritakan kisah-kisah menyeramkan yang penuh dengan hantu, misteri, dan kejadian supranatural. Namun, ketika malam semakin larut, mereka menyadari bahwa kisah paling mengerikan bukanlah cerita yang mereka ceritakan, melainkan teror nyata yang mulai menghantui mereka satu per satu.

programme.title: Laugh Riot: The Misadventure
programme.desc: Frankie Blair Presents: Laugh Riot adalah serial komedi stand-up yang dinamis dan menghibur, menampilkan beragam komedian dengan gaya humor yang unik. Dipandu oleh Tahir Moore dan diproduseri oleh Frankie Blair, acara berenergi tinggi ini menghadirkan tawa segar sekaligus merayakan talenta-talenta berbakat yang selama ini kurang mendapat sorotan.

programme.title: The Frame
programme.desc: Dua orang asing mendapati hidup mereka bertabrakan dengan cara yang mustahil. Alex adalah pencuri kargo metodis yang bekerja untuk kartel berbahaya. Sam adalah seorang paramedis yang gigih berusaha menyelamatkan dunia sambil lari dari masa lalunya.

programme.title: Iron Fist: Rebellion
programme.desc: Seorang pemuda dianugerahi kemampuan bela diri yang luar biasa serta kekuatan mistis yang dikenal sebagai Iron Fist.

programme.title: Snapshot Of Love
programme.desc: Adrian adalah seorang paparazzi Hollywood yang ditugaskan untuk mengambil foto seorang bintang yang sangat sulit ditemui, Parker Bennett. Tanpa disadarinya, ia akan mendapat kesempatan itu ketika mereka berdua menginap di penginapan yang sama di pegunungan Carolina Utara.

programme.title: The Simpsons Movie
programme.desc: (2007) Animated comedy. When Homer's love for a pig causes world-threatening pollution, Springfield gets enclosed in a huge dome. D'oh! Will he do the decent thing and save his neighbours?

programme.title: Sukarno

programme.title: The Vardys
programme.desc: After an emotional farewell to their home and family in the UK, Becky and the kids make the big move to Italy, taking everything with them - including their dogs and grand piano. But Italian life is immediately complicated, with a frustrated Jamie injured and unable to play but desperate to start scoring goals for his new club. The kids love their new Italian home but struggle being away from friends - will Becky and Jamie's grand plans for Sofia's birthday be enough to take her mind off friends back home? With Jamie's punishing training schedule taking its toll, he doesn't get as much time with the family as he'd like, leaving Becky to help them settle in and do her best to source home comforts for the kids - but she can't find baked beans or orange squash anywhere. Still, Jamie makes time for some magic family moments, and the family begin to find their feet, learning the language, experiencing the culture and Jamie makes his much-awaited debut on the pitch with explosive results.

programme.title: The Vardys
programme.desc: Despite Jamie's best efforts on the pitch, his new Italian side are struggling to get a win and stay out of the relegation zone. Things go from bad to worse when the Vardys' lakeside villa is dramatically burgled, leaving the whole family on edge and considering whether to return home. Becky and the kids escape to the mountains for a much-needed change of scenery and time to think clearly about their situation. On a whistle-stop trip back to the UK, Becky and Jamie stage an elaborate photoshoot but also find a quiet moment to make the big decision: whatever happens with the football, they will bring the kids home. On Easter Sunday in Italy, Becky and Jamie reveal their decision to the kids during an Easter Egg hunt to an overwhelming reaction. Shortly after, Becky and Jamie fly the kids back to the UK, arriving home for an emotional reunion with family and friends. But when the season is over, will Jamie be joining them for good or stay in Italy - or will a whole new adventure begin?

programme.desc: Teleshopping. [HD]

programme.desc: The emergency nurses of Norfolk and Norwich University Hospital take you behind the curtains of East Anglia's busiest A and E department in this documentary series to prove that passion, care and a good sense of humour are crucial to working in one - in this episode, nurse Jo identifies with a young asthma patient, the team tend to an elderly couple involved in a joint accident, and Charlie celebrates her engagement.

programme.title: Unwind with ITV
programme.desc: Your daily escape designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection. [S,HD]

programme.title: Jason Atherton's Dubai Dishes
programme.desc: This series follows chef Jason Atherton in Dubai as he showcases some fantastic local ingredients, celebrated foodie hotspots, and brilliant local chefs as he cooks up some delicious recipes that are inspired by the region.

programme.title: Dermot's Taste of Ireland
programme.desc: Arriving in Derry at the end of the Causeway Coastal Route, Dermot finds a city rewriting its story, with the River Foyle as its beating heart. At the Walled City Brewery - once Army Barracks during the Troubles - he uncovers a secret local ingredient behind their standout brews. For a fresh perspective, Dermot hits the water with kayak instructor Michelle, paddling the Foyle and taking in the skyline from a whole new angle - equal parts scenic and splashy. Back on land, things get fiery on a double-decker bus-turned-taco joint. At Pyke 'N' Pommes, local legend Kevin Pyke blends bold Mexican flavours with top-notch Irish seafood. Dermot gets hands-on, prepping calamari and building tasty tacos that capture Derry's evolving food scene.

programme.title: Love Your Weekend with Alan Titchmarsh
programme.desc: Joining Alan Titchmarsh at Manor Farm are Stephen Tompkinson and West End and Broadway star Kerry Ellis. We go behind the scenes at the Globe Theatre ahead of their summer season, and Queen of Herbs Jekka McVicar says 'I do' with herbs with a romantic tale in time for wedding season. Plus, wine expert Toni Osoba has the very best in summer sparkles, and we hear from one woman who gave up her job as a nurse to become a farmer - and she joins us with three of her impressive Highland cows.

programme.title: Ainsley's Fantastic Flavours
programme.desc: Ainsley gets cosy in the kitchen with some recipes to warm the cockles of your heart. programme.title: Dermot's Taste of Ireland
programme.desc: Dermot travels to Letterkenny in Donegal, often called Ireland's 'forgotten county', but quickly discovers a place full of unforgettable people, stories and food. Surrounded by ancient rainforest, he heads into the woods to forage for prized golden chanterelle mushrooms before visiting the renowned Lemon Tree Restaurant, where he learns to make tortellini completely from scratch with one of Donegal's most skilled chefs. Dermot also meets Abdul, a Syrian refugee-turned-honey farmer, who teaches him how to extract honey from the hive and shares traditions from home, including how Syrians enjoy honey with strong coffee and a sweet dish called knaffe. Along the way, Dermot uncovers a county quietly building one of Ireland's most exciting food scenes, shaped by resilience, creativity and a deep connection to the land.

programme.title: James Martin's French Adventure
programme.desc: James is in the city of Arles, which is famous for its Roman architecture and where young daredevils play a dangerous game with bulls - it is also home to the largest market in Provence, so James sets up his mobile kitchen to cook a dish of John Dory with tomatoes, courgettes and clams all sourced from the surrounding stalls. A trip to award-winning wine producer Chateau Romanin then gets James to change his thinking on the merits of rose wine before he has a go at pottery with his teacher Cecile, who supplies her beautiful creations to L'Oustau de Baumaniere, a two-starred Michelin restaurant just 15 miles outside Arles. James then heads to an olive grove to cook some pan-fried lamb chops with baby aubergines before taking artistic inspiration from one of Arles's famous residents - Vincent Van Gogh. Back home, he bakes a satisfying salmon en croute and some chocolate and hazelnut meringues.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series about a curmudgeonly GP. Louisa is grumpy and can't sleep because Martin can't sleep - Mrs Tishell and Jennifer continue their battle of wills in the chemist when Louisa comes in and asks for something to help with sleep. Jennifer suggests lavender oil which Mrs Tishell dismisses as a herbal remedy, but this doesn't put Louisa off and she douses Martin's pillow with the oil - however, Martin can smell it a mile off and Louisa has to come clean. Elsewhere, Martin treats the local hypochondriac and becomes concerned that he may have been exposed to asbestos while doing roof conversions in the village, and Jennifer is worried when she and Mrs Tishell get a letter from the Pharmaceutical Council saying that Mrs Tishell no longer needs supervision - Bert is miserable about Jennifer leaving as Al tells him that he should do something to get her to stay, and that is exactly what he does...

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series about a curmudgeonly GP. Louisa tries to get Martin to open up about the loss of his father, but Martin says that it doesn't affect him - when Louisa suggests a break so they can all get away and spend some time together, Martin doesn't want to and Louisa is hurt by this. At the same time, things are strained between Martin and his mother - she is trying to connect with him, but he is cutting her off. Elsewhere, Mrs Tishell is smitten by the hand-holding and the staring into her eyes of the Doc during a routine examination and falls head over heels in love with him again, there is a visit at the police station by two military policemen looking for Mike Pruddy, and the wind is taken out of Al's sails when he tells his dad about a business idea he has - to be a middleman between tourists wanting fishing trips and the fishermen - and Bert laughs at the idea as he thinks there is no way that the fishermen will give him a ten per cent cut of their take.

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: Drama series exploring the personal and professional lives of two female detectives in Manchester. Howeverm when his aunt is identifying the bodies, she tells them that Carla did not die, but was disowned by the family after failed attempts at rehab...

programme.title: Scott & Bailey

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: Drama based on the novel by Ann Cleeves. After news breaks that Jeanine Long has taken her own life, evidence comes to light exonerating her for the murder of 15-year-old Abigail Mantel 11 years earlier. Jeanie had always insisted on her innocence but no-one - including her own family - believed her. Vera sets out to solve the mystery of Abigail's death, and she and her team delve into the secrets and lies of a small community which is still feeling the repercussions of the killing. Vera digs away at the evidence in her efforts to get closer to the truth, but not before the case takes a violent and unexpected turn when another, potentially connected, murder occurs. With a killer on the loose and the pressure building, Vera must use her skill and instinct to expose the lies at the community's heart - and to lay the ghosts of Abigail and Jeanie to rest.

programme.desc: Comedy-drama series. The Winchester Club is faced with permanent closure when one of Arthur's money-making schemes backfires badly, but Ray is on hand with an idea - how about a charity football match between the Winchester XI and the local police?

programme.title: Motorsport Mundial
programme.desc: This programme brings you up to date with the latest action from the world of motorsport and features race coverage, insights, and behind-the-scenes footage from the planet's biggest and best motorsport series. These include the World Rally Championship (WRC), Formula One, World Motocross, NASCAR, British Touring Cars and much more.

programme.title: World Auto
programme.desc: The latest news and reviews from the world of cars.

programme.title: Ninja Warrior UK: Race For Glory
programme.desc: With brand-new obstacles to face, the course is more extreme than ever - in the second episode, more 'Superhero' contestants try their luck against the toughest obstacle course on TV. Competing alongside them are Good Morning Britain weatherman Alex Beresford, former British Rugby player Maggie Alphonsi, and a very special mystery guest!

programme.title: Isle of Man TT Highlights
programme.desc: Senior: Action from the Milwaukee Senior TT. The defining test of rider, machine and mindset - it is the race every competitor dreams of winning. [S]

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Extreme angler Jeremy Wade travels to the Himalayas to investigate river attacks.

programme.title: British Touring Car Championship Live

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Nail-biting documentary series. Jack Jessee traverses steep mountain passes during an urgent fuel delivery and fears that he may get stranded on a frozen river as a storm closes in, Lisa Kelly faces a big challenge as she handles an oversized load that leaves little margin for error, and the rivalry between Alex Debogorski and Hugh Rowland continues.

programme.title: Made in Britain
programme.desc: Edwin Jagger Safety Razors and Savile Row Suits: Meet the Sheffield man making classic safety razors, then learn about the labour of love that goes into making a Savile Row suit. [S,AD] S1 Ep16

programme.title: World of Sport

programme.title: Road to 26: Morocco v Norway
programme.desc: The Road to 26 series continues with a game between Morocco, who reached the World Cup semi-finals in Qatar 2022, and Norway, who have not qualified for a World Cup since 1998. [S]

programme.title: Goals of the 1990s
programme.desc: A look at some of the greatest goals from the 1990s, including memorable World Cup strikes by Platt, Maradona and Owen, and Euros classics from Gascoigne, Suker and Poborsky. [S]

programme.title: Isle of Man TT Highlights

programme.title: Ricis The Adventure

programme.title: Dragons

programme.title: Little Charmers
programme.desc: Di tanah ajaib Charmville, Charmer-in-training Hazel dan sahabatnya, Posie dan Lavender, masih terbiasa dengan kekuatan mereka. Hazel yang tak kenal takut, memimpin kelompok dalam petualangan yang dirancang kemampuan magis mereka.

programme.title: Bisik Hati Lara
programme.desc: LARA sebagai anak sulung, tak punya pilihan selain harus mencari pekerjaan tambahan, demi adik satu- satunya, LENA, bisa melanjutkan SMA nya sampai lulus, sembari memastikan terapi pengobatan Ibu.

programme.title: Brata S2
programme.desc: Pembunuhan brutal terjadi di ATM kampung Sukadamai. Roni harus memimpin penyelidikan karena Brata dipindahkan ke bagian arsip. Sukadamai membawa Brata kembali ke mimpi buruk di masa lalu.

programme.title: Angling Dharma S1

programme.title: Negeri 5 Menara

programme.desc: Kepulangan Sarah bersama Dul ke Jakarta, disambut bahagia oleh keluarga Doel. Namun hal tersebut juga membuat Zaenab, Sarahdan Doel dihadapkan pada dilemma untuk menentukan pilihan.

programme.title: Warkop Reborn 4
programme.desc: Dijatuhi hukuman gantung di pusat kota, Warkop DKI berhasil melarikan diri ke Maroko. Di sana mereka bertemu seseorang yang mengendalikan jaringan mata-mata anak-anak. Mereka berhasil mengetahui keberadaan Inka di sebuah riad.

programme.desc: Mini series yang menceritakan suka dan duka mencari pasangan melalui kencan buta.

programme.title: FA Cup Final v C Palace
programme.desc: United Archives 12/5/90. An epic game that went the distance as Alex Ferguson and United old boy Steve Coppell pitched their management skills against each other at Wembley.

programme.title: 1968 European Cup Final
programme.desc: United Archives 29/5/68. Matt Busby had led his side from the tragedy of Munich to the brink of glory at Wembley, could they beat Benfica and be crowned kings of Europe?

programme.title: FAC Final v Brighton 82/83
programme.desc: United Archives 26/5/83. Brighton were the underdogs having finished bottom of the league. United finished third in the league and were looking for their 5th FA Cup win.

programme.title: 1977 FAC Final v Liverpool
programme.desc: United Archives 21/5/77. The 1977 FA Cup Final: United were the underdogs and out to spoil Liverpool's chances of a treble.

programme.title: 2008 CL Final v Chelsea
programme.desc: United Archives 21/5/08. 50 years after Munich, 40 years on from Wembley and 9 years after Barcelona, United take on Chelsea bidding to rule Europe for the third time.

programme.title: 2010 LC Final v Aston Villa
programme.desc: United Archives 28/2/10. The final of the 2010 Carling Cup and United hope to retain the trophy they won 12 months earlier.

programme.title: 1991 CWC Final: in Barcelona
programme.desc: United Archives 15/5/91. United travel to Feyenoord Stadium in Rotterdam to face Barcelona in the 1991 European Cup Winners Cup Final.

programme.title: 1999 UCL Final v Bayern Munich
programme.desc: United Archives 26/5/99. An absolute classic, with two trophies in the bag only Bayern Munich stood between United and an unprecedented treble.

programme.title: EFL Cup Final v Soton 16/17
programme.desc: United Archives 26/2/17. The Reds were aiming to lift the first domestic silverware up for grabs in the 2016/17 campaign as they walked out at Wembley to face Claude Puel's Southampton side.

programme.title: 1996 FA Cup Final: v Liverpool
programme.desc: United Archives 11/5/96. United were aiming to become the first club to win the FA Cup 9 times in this final against Liverpool and also win the League and Cup double on two occasions.

programme.desc: From 2018. The team's vacation plans are put on hold when a lonely infant is found during a homicide investigation.

programme.title: The Bodyguard From Beijing

programme.title: The Hunger Games: Mockingjay Part 1
programme.desc: The worldwide phenomenon continues. Katniss (Jennifer Lawrence) has survived and destroyed the Hunger Games, and now rises with District 13 to fight against President Snow (Donald Sutherland).

programme.title: Hunger Games: Mockingjay, Pt 1
programme.desc: Katniss Everdeen berada di Distrik 13 setelah ia menghancurkan dunia game selamanya. Di bawah kepemimpinan Presiden Coin dan nasihat dari teman-teman kepercayaannya, Katniss mengembangkan sayapnya saat ia berjuang menyelamatkan Peeta dan bangsa yang tergerak oleh keberaniannya.

programme.title: Get Out
programme.desc: Chris joins his girlfriend Rose for a weekend at her family's estate. At first, their warm welcome seems like awkwardness about their interracial relationship—until disturbing truths emerge.

programme.title: Get Out
programme.desc: Seorang pemuda Afrika-Amerika mengunjungi orangtua pacarnya yang berkulit putih untuk akhir pekan, di mana kegelisahannya yang membara tentang penerimaan mereka terhadapnya akhirnya mencapai titik didih.

programme.title: Shaolin Vs. Evil Dead 2: Ultimate Power
programme.desc: A kung fu fighter's Taoist priest friend has turned into a vampire, hell-bent on leading his legion of vampires to bring eternal darkness to the nation.

programme.title: Shaolin Vs Evil Dead 2

programme.title: The Hunger Games
programme.desc: Every district in the nation of Panem must send a boy and girl to fight to the death in the annual Hunger Games competition. Jennifer Lawrence is 16-year-old Katniss Everdeen, who volunteers to take her younger sister's place in the games.

programme.title: The Hunger Games
programme.desc: Katniss Everdeen secara sukarela menggantikan adik perempuannya dalam Hunger Games: sebuah kompetisi televisi di mana dua remaja dari masing-masing dua belas Distrik Panem dipilih secara acak untuk bertarung sampai mati.

programme.title: Waterworld
programme.desc: In *Waterworld*, Kevin Costner stars as a lone maverick in a flooded future Earth, protecting a mother and daughter from a tribe of ruthless nomads. Dennis Hopper delivers a memorable villainous performance in this thrilling adventure.

programme.title: Waterworld
programme.desc: Es di kutub telah mencair, dan bumi ditutupi oleh air. Manusia-manusia yang tersisa pergi mengarungi lautan untuk bertahan hidup.

programme.title: Total Recall
programme.desc: In 2084, construction worker Douglas Quaid visits Rekall for a virtual Mars vacation—but the procedure unlocks hidden memories, thrusting him into a deadly rebellion and a secret-agent past.

programme.title: Total Recall
programme.desc: Kehidupan seorang pekerja pabrik, Douglas Quaid, berubah drastis saat ia menjadi buronan setelah mengunjungi Rekall, sebuah perusahaan yang menanamkan memori buatan pada klien-kliennya.

programme.title: The Bodyguard From Beijing
programme.desc: Corrupt tycoon kills witness to a crime. Only the girlfriend of a businessman with Chinese govt. ties saw it. Beijing bodyguard helps Hong Kong police protect her. But he and the witness develop feelings, complicating matters.

programme.title: The Legend 2
programme.desc: Tokoh utama Kanton, Fong Sai Yuk, terlibat dalam persaudaraan rahasia "Bunga Merah", yang berusaha menggulingkan kaisar Manchuria dan membangun kembali dinasti Ming. Gejolak sosial tersebut dipadukan dengan konflik moral pribadi Sai Yuk tentang bagaimana menyesuaikan diri dengan rezim persaudaraan yang kaku, dan di samping itu, menyelesaikan kehidupan cintanya yang rumit, dengan dua calon istri.

programme.desc: Seekor koala mengadakan kompetisi menyanyi terbesar untuk menyelamatkan teaternya yang hampir bangkrut dari penyitaan.

programme.desc: Sebuah pertempuran aksi berskala besar terjadi di lautan, langit, dan daratan ketika armada angkatan laut umat manusia harus berjuang sekuat tenaga bertahan dari invasi kekuatan asing.

programme.title: Blockers
programme.desc: Ketika tiga orang tua menemukan perjanjian putri mereka untuk kehilangan keperawanan mereka di pesta prom, mereka melancarkan operasi rahasia satu malam untuk menghentikan para remaja tersebut dari mewujudkan perjanjian itu.

programme.title: Creepy Pasta
programme.desc: Terperangkap di sebuah rumah yang ditinggalkan, seorang pria tanpa nama mati-matian mencari petunjuk tentang bagaimana dia bisa sampai di sana. Jawabannya tersembunyi dalam serangkaian video viral yang mengganggu, yang masing-masing mulai menginfeksi pikirannya.

programme.title: Chapter 1: Mae Nak Reborn
programme.desc: Mae Nak, sang istri hantu, kembali untuk membalas dendam atas seorang wanita hamil yang mengalami pelecehan seksual dan kehilangan bayinya. Tidak seorang pun dapat mengenali si penyerang kecuali Mae Nak, yang berubah menjadi roh jahat untuk menghukum si penyerang atas perbuatan jahatnya.

programme.title: Impermanence
programme.desc: Serangkaian kejadian aneh terjadi di sebuah desa, di antaranya sesosok mayat yang bangkit dari kuburnya dan melarikan diri. Saat diselidiki penduduk desa, seorang penjahat meninggal dan sang kepala desa menghilang.

programme.title: Kingmaker
programme.desc: Film ini didasarkan pada kisah anekdotal tentang hubungan kerja antara Kim Dae-jung dan ahli strategi politiknya, Uhm Chang-rok. Seo Chang-dae adalah seorang ahli strategi politik yang mengutamakan kemenangan di atas segalanya, sedangkan Kim Woon-beom adalah seorang politisi dengan ambisi menjadi presiden terkemuka. Namun, konflik internal dalam kampanye muncul saat Seo Chang Dae mendesak Kim Woon Bum untuk melakukan beberapa taktik curang.

programme.title: A Taxi Driver (tvN Movies)

programme.title: Cold Eyes

programme.title: The Bad Guys: Reign Of Chaos
You Will Die In 6 Hours
programme.desc: Jun Woo memperingatkan Jeong Yun tentang pembunuhan yang akan menimpanya. Dengan rasa skeptis, ia mulai menyelidiki dan menemukan keterkaitan Jun Woo dengan serangkaian pembunuhan. Ia pun berpacu dengan waktu untuk mengetahui apakah Jun Woo melindunginya atau justru menipunya sebelum kematian yang telah diramalkan itu terjadi.

programme.desc: When he suffers a plane crash that leaves him stranded on a desert island, an executive must learn to survive the next 4 years facing nature. After being rescued, he discovers that the love of his life is already married.

programme.title: Unexpected miracles
programme.desc: Based on the novel by Stephen King, a prison guard, who watches over a man condemned to death, develops a deep relationship with the terminally ill man and learns that miracles happen in the most unexpected places.

programme.title: Matrix resurrections
programme.desc: Thomas Anderson leads a comfortable life as an eminence in the world of video games, but he has trouble discerning between what is reality and what is not. Thomas must decide whether to follow the white rabbit once again.

programme.title: Ghostbusters: The Legacy
programme.desc: A single mother and her two children go to live in a small town, where they will discover their connection to the origins of the Ghostbusters and the secret legacy that their grandfather has left them.

programme.title: Dredd
programme.desc: In a violent and futuristic city where the police have the authority to act as judge and executioner, Dredd, an experienced agent, together with a trainee, must face a gang that deals with a drug that alters reality.

programme.title: Bitter Christmas - Inside Warner
programme.desc: Enjoy interviews with the cast and behind the scenes of the film "Bitter Christmas", written and directed by Pedro Almodóvar.

programme.title: Blade: Trinity
programme.desc: Blade, after falling into the FBI's net, is forced to join forces with the "Nightstalkers." Together with Abigail and Hannibal, he tracks down an ancient creature that is stalking him: Dracula.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: With us, television becomes a shopping mall: Our teleshopping partners bring interesting and innovative products from the areas of kitchen, household, beauty, wellness, leisure and fitness directly into the living room of TV viewers. (Station info).

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: With us, television becomes a shopping mall: Our teleshopping partners bring interesting and innovative products from the areas of kitchen, household, beauty, wellness, leisure and fitness directly into the living room of TV viewers. (Station info).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: Moderator Martin Utberg and his team partner Sven Bössow are taking part in the Black Forest Winter Challenge, organized by the Hotel Ritter in Durbach, which is well-known among classic car lovers. For this occasion, Martin and Sven drive a Porsche 924 S from 1987. (Station info).

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: It looks like a Ferrari, but comes from the Lower Bavarian province: the Glas GT. Uwe Gusen is one of the few who are still interested in the Glas brand - because it is racing at full speed into oblivion. If you want to buy one, you should hurry up and know your way around. (Station info).

programme.title: Four-wheel drive adventure
programme.desc: Adventure Allrad, a special interest magazine about off-road and all-wheel drive vehicles. The focus is on off-road veterans and cars with four-wheel drive. (Station info).

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: For the joy of driving: That's what BMW, one of the most successful automobile companies in the world, stands for. The decidedly sporty automobiles and motorcycles from Bayrisch Motorenwerke AG are equally successful with customers and in racing. But the former aircraft engine manufacturer's entry into automobile production threatened to fail early on. (Station info).

programme.title: Green wave
programme.desc: The recipe for a successful car these days usually consists of: SUV shape and electric drive. The Avenger is Jeep's new smallest car in its lineup. The winner of the Car of the Year Award will go on a 250 kilometer road trip through Germany. The Cupra Tavascan is also the brand's first electric SUV. Can he set himself apart from his VW Group brothers? (Station info).

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: The Mitsubishi Lancer began its career in the World Rally Championship in 1993 as the Evolution I. Off the road he shows what he can do and with great success. In 1996, Tommi Mäkinen achieved five World Championship race victories with the EVO III and won the title. But the success story doesn't end there. The Subaru WRX Sti is also extremely successful in rallying. What's interesting is that the two Japanese are so similar that they have been compared for model generations. Motorvision introduces the two opponents! (Station info).

programme.title: Crash
programme.desc: When ambition exceeds driving ability and when well-secured racing professionals are carried out of the curve, then we are there with the camera. Breathtaking stunts of professional drivers and slapsticks of sophisticated tin bullets. Spectacular scenes in which no one is harmed. (Station info).

programme.title: Spotted
programme.desc: England Special. England is the craziest car country in the world: the steering wheel is on the right, driving is on the left, UK cars offer everything but average. Whether Aston Martin, Jaguar, Bentley or Morgan and McLaren, MV Spotted shows the most spectacular UK convertibles, coupes and supercars. MV Spotted also shows the tics of the British, bizarre competitions such as lawnmower racing and the cult of James Bond. (Station info).

programme.title: 4x4 – Das Allrad Magazin
programme.desc: Porsche is exiting the diesel business. Hybrids like the Cayenne E-Hybrid should become more important. We tested its 3.2 liter average consumption. We also explore the region around Spartenburg in the BMW X4 – the birthplace of the coupé SAV. (Station info).

programme.title: Cars + Life
programme.desc: On the occasion of Skoda's 125th anniversary, we look back at the eventful history of one of the oldest automobile manufacturers in the world. Also: our practical test of the Volkswagen ID.3, the first purely electric car from VW. And: the McLaren 720S Spider, the super sports car is now also available as a convertible. (Station info).

programme.title: Tuning – it doesn’t get any lower than that!
programme.desc: Evil eye, explosive power – outlaw image: street fighter. 20 years ago they were still rare lone warriors and are now part of everyday street life. But where does this trend actually come from – and how has it developed further? We find answers at the Fighterama sports and tuning trade fair - the annual meeting place for customizing and tuning beyond the Harley. The chief fighter is the trade fair organizer Markus Broix - here at the befitting donut burn - he was there from the start. (Station info).

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: Stuntman Dominik is an expert in falls and body stunts. But today he has to drive the stunt car. The task: drive straight through a truck and do a complete rollover. Firstly: The number is not for the faint of heart. Second: The number is dangerous! (Station info).

programme.title: Dumbest Stuff on Wheels
programme.desc: Bizarre mishaps, weird crashes and unbelievable nonsense on four wheels, fabricated in everyday life and immortalized on camera. Great workout for your laughing muscles! (Station info).

programme.title: Made in....
programme.desc: A TV portrait! Abt Sportsline is the world's largest refiner of vehicles from the Volkswagen Group and is closely linked to the Audi brand. The company's second pillar: motorsport. Whether DTM, formula or GT racing. The abbots are always at the forefront. A company with a unique success story and constant growth. (Station info).

programme.title: Mission Mobility
programme.desc: Dubai - city of luxury, fast cars and incredible stories. Just like a man's: his passion is cars: fast cars. Nice cars. Special cars. And he has two dream jobs: He is a racing driver and president of the Porsche Club in the United Arab Emirates. Karim Al Azhari loves and lives luxury, but every now and then he is really stressed. For example, when, like now, he has to organize a motorsport event on the Abu Dhabi racing circuit. (Station info).

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.desc: Motorcycle riding fun is diverse. Some like retro, others look to the future. We test the Royal Enfield Shotgun 650 in an old-school look and reveal exciting facts about the Indian manufacturer with British roots. Also: Electric motorcycles aren't fun? We check whether this is true and take a closer look at the Can-Am Pulse electric city cruiser. (Station info).

programme.title: Super Cars
programme.desc: Which sports car fan doesn't secretly dream of a Porsche 911. It is THE sports car from Germany. Compact, iconic and stable in value. And that despite the fact that with over 1.3 million units it is one of the most produced sports cars of all time. Classic car dealer Michael Schnabl, founder of Motorlegenden, makes car dreams come true. His specialty: rare and incredibly expensive Porsche models. (Station info).

programme.title: Biker Lifestyle
programme.desc: Magazine for motorcycle fans for whom motorcycling is not just a hobby, but a way of life. Whether Ducati or Kawasaki, Suzuki or the classic Harley Davidson, whether an off-the-shelf motorcycle or a specially made custom bike. There are reports about biker clubs and real enthusiasts, about tours, meetings and events. (Station info).

programme.title: Classic
programme.desc: An extremely powerful V8 engine embedded in a delicate roadster body: The AC Cobra is more animal than car with simply adventurous driving characteristics. Rolf Versen has been driving a Cobra for 30 years and is still loyal to his reptile. Also: Classic celebrates the French all-round genius Lucien Rosengartd and his speedsters. And: On the road with friends of old fire engines. (Station info).

programme.title: Crash
programme.desc: When ambition exceeds driving ability and when well-secured racing professionals are carried out of the curve, then we are there with the camera. Breathtaking stunts of professional drivers and slapsticks of sophisticated tin bullets. Spectacular scenes in which no one is harmed. (Station info).

programme.title: Dream Cars
programme.desc: They are the most spectacular convertibles in the world, two-seater racing cars without a roof, built for top speeds of over 300 kilometers per hour, built for unique driving pleasure, the super sports convertibles from Ferrari, Lamborghini, Porsche, Bentley and McLaren. Engines with more than 500 hp, chassis from Formula 1, as well as breathtaking body shapes, SuperSport convertibles are the most fascinating of all automobiles. Dream Cars presents the fastest and most exclusive SuperSport convertibles in the world. (Station info).

programme.title: Classic
programme.desc: The Reliant Scimitar is virtually unknown in Germany, but in England it was a car with a kind of cult status just a few decades ago. This is probably why the British royal family used this vehicle as a means of transport for many years. Classic introduces the exotic. Plus: a transport wonder on three wheels. The Moto Guzzi Hercules saves many a small farmer. (Station info).

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: Classic Rides rummages through the automotive treasure chest and brings to light some almost forgotten, some noble, some bizarre cars from the last few decades. (Station info).

programme.title: Four-wheel drive adventure
programme.desc: A special interest magazine about off-road and all-wheel drive vehicles. The focus is on off-road veterans and cars with four-wheel drive. (Station info).

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: It's the James Dean Porsche, the 550 Spyder. It is small, flat and fast. And it will only be built 140 times. Nevertheless, the Porsche 550 Spyder makes history. It is the first racing sports car from Porsche, and it laid the foundation for the sports car manufacturer from Stuttgart to be considered a major player in racing today. There is no race that he doesn't win, he has been considered unbeatable for many years. And it is the car in which Hollywood star James Dean had a fatal accident. The accident makes Dean and the 550 Spyder a legend. Car History tells the whole story of the dream car from the 1950s. (Station info).

programme.title: Green wave
programme.desc: Electric cars are emotionless and boring? These electric cars want to prove the opposite: The VW ID. Buzz GTX throws all-wheel drive and 340 hp into the ring. But how athletic is he really? And this isn't an electric car at all, at least that's how it's supposed to sound and feel. The Hyundai Ioniq 5 N makes you think you are sitting in a high-performance gasoline engine. We reveal how exactly this works. (Station info).

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: Audi A1 quattro vs Renault Clio R.S. – two crazy small cars in the Perfect Ride comparison test! The Audi A1 quattro has a 1.2 liter 4-cylinder turbo engine with 256 hp. Top speed: 245. Renault has with the Clio R.S. turned one of its most traditional models into a powerful little racing machine: 1.6 liter 4-cylinder turbo, 200 hp and a top speed of 225 km/h. Two spirited racers, neither of whom knows exactly where they belong: on the racetrack or in the city. (Station info).

programme.title: Australian Superbike Championship 2024
programme.desc: In the third part of the 6th ASBK event at One Raceway we will once again focus on the juniors in the Oceania Junior Cup, the R3 Cup and the Supersport 300 class. (Station info).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: Top Speed ​​is all about classic automobiles. Moderator Martin Utberg actively takes part in the most beautiful classic car events in the world. Here you not only see old cars, but also experience the whole history of the classic jewels and their owners. (Station info).

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: Mercedes-Benz is the most successful automobile brand in motorsport. From the world's first car race in 1894 to today's Formula 1, Mercedes has been winning races all over the world for over 120 years. Whether Panamericana or Le Mans, DTM or Indianapolis, Silver Arrows or Formula 1, no other manufacturer has won as many races as Mercedes. The Mercedes racing drivers are always the greatest and most famous drivers of their time like Rudolf Carracciola, Juan Manuel Fangio or Lewis Hamilton. (Station info).

programme.title: Classic
programme.desc: Classic cars and everything that goes with them: events, racing, portraits, mechanic tips and the most beautiful pictures from the automobile archives from all over the world. The most beautiful oldies, the hottest racing cars from bygone eras. (Station info).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: Top Speed ​​is all about classic automobiles. Moderator Martin Utberg actively takes part in the most beautiful classic car events in the world. Here you not only see old cars, but also experience the whole history of the classic jewels and their owners. (Station info).

programme.title: Racing Files
programme.sub-title: McLaren – from Formula 1 to Can Am
programme.desc: McLaren is the second oldest active team in Formula 1 and now enjoys worldwide fame. However, when it was founded, hardly anyone would have expected that the team founded by New Zealand racing driver Bruce McLaren would develop into a heavyweight in the world of super sports cars and one of the best-known teams in motorsport. Racing Files tells the story of McLaren. (Station info).

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy 2026
programme.desc: Another total cancellation of the race day on the Isle of Man due to the weather, but instead we had the opportunity to talk in more detail with the Crowe brothers and Davey Todd and take a look back at the most spectacular races of the week. (Station info).

programme.title: Icelandic Formula Offroad 2025
programme.desc: Formula Off Road was invented in Iceland. Hoping to raise more money for the Icelandic rescue teams, the teams began showing their 4WD cars in action in the Icelandic hills. (Station info).

programme.title: All Wheel Drive Safari Challenge 2025
programme.desc: The "AWDC" is a British off-road event in which drivers have to tackle narrow and winding roads full of mud and gravel (channel info).

programme.title: US Pro Pulling 2023
programme.desc: Motorsport like you've never seen it before. In this competition, drivers use multi-engine, modified tractors to pull a heavy sled around the track. Some tractors can even produce more than 12,000 horsepower. This makes tractor pulling the strongest motorsport in the world. (Station info).

programme.title: Classic Races
programme.desc: In 1976 and the following years, BMW was particularly successful in motorsport. Numerous victories and successes on different vehicles were achieved for BMW Motorsport. (Station info).

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: Classic Rides rummages through the automotive treasure chest and brings to light some almost forgotten, some noble, some bizarre cars from the last few decades. (Station info).

programme.title: Four-wheel drive adventure
programme.desc: A special interest magazine about off-road and all-wheel drive vehicles. The focus is on off-road veterans and cars with four-wheel drive. (Station info).

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: It's the James Dean Porsche, the 550 Spyder. It is small, flat and fast. And it will only be built 140 times. Nevertheless, the Porsche 550 Spyder makes history. It is the first racing sports car from Porsche, and it laid the foundation for the sports car manufacturer from Stuttgart to be considered a major player in racing today. There is no race that he doesn't win, he has been considered unbeatable for many years. And it is the car in which Hollywood star James Dean had a fatal accident. The accident makes Dean and the 550 Spyder a legend. Car History tells the whole story of the dream car from the 1950s. (Station info).

programme.title: Green wave
programme.desc: Electric cars are emotionless and boring? These electric cars want to prove the opposite: The VW ID. Buzz GTX throws all-wheel drive and 340 hp into the ring. But how athletic is he really? And this isn't an electric car at all, at least that's how it's supposed to sound and feel. The Hyundai Ioniq 5 N makes you think you are sitting in a high-performance gasoline engine. We reveal how exactly this works. (Station info).

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: Audi A1 quattro vs Renault Clio R.S. – two crazy small cars in the Perfect Ride comparison test! The Audi A1 quattro has a 1.2 liter 4-cylinder turbo engine with 256 hp. Top speed: 245. Renault has with the Clio R.S. turned one of its most traditional models into a powerful little racing machine: 1.6 liter 4-cylinder turbo, 200 hp and a top speed of 225 km/h. Two spirited racers, neither of whom knows exactly where they belong: on the racetrack or in the city. (Station info).

programme.title: Crash
programme.desc: When ambition exceeds driving ability and when well-secured racing professionals are carried out of the curve, then we are there with the camera. Breathtaking stunts of professional drivers and slapsticks of sophisticated tin bullets. Spectacular scenes in which no one is harmed. (Station info).

programme.title: Gearing Up 2026
programme.desc: Pure passion for racing, extraordinary talent and thrills right up to the last second - that's what this magazine promises, reporting on the most exciting motorsport events. (Station info).

programme.title: Super Cars
programme.desc: Compact high-performance models have a long-standing tradition at BMW. From the 2002 turbo to the 1 Series M Coupe to the current M2. We take a closer look at the second generation and test the drifting potential, racing and everyday qualities of the M2. What does he do best? We also look at its history and development and take a look at its competitors. (Station info).

programme.title: 4x4 – Das Allrad Magazin
programme.desc: Sand, scree, water or asphalt Adventures can be had on any surface if you have the right vehicle. The Can-Am Outlander and Maverick R are the ultimate fun machines for off-road driving fun. We put them to the test in Portugal. And this is supposed to be a Smart? Yes, actually #5 turns everything we thought we knew about the popular kissing ball upside down. (Station info).

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: Robust and popular - these are the keywords for these models. Subaru has renamed the XV. Completely renovated and with the new name Cros-strek, the SUV is now looking for customers. We reveal what's behind it. And Cupra is giving its bestseller Formentor an update that is particularly causing a visual sensation. We explain why. (Station info).

programme.title: Biker Lifestyle
programme.desc: The north of Thailand is a popular travel destination, not just for adventurous individual tourists. The north is known for its mountainous, densely forested areas and therefore this region is also a paradise for motorcyclists. Thousands of curves on well-developed roads with little traffic and a diversity of culture and landscape make this region a perfect holiday destination for us to escape the winter in Germany for the fourth time. We will take you on a 1600 km long motorcycle tour to the most beautiful places in northern Thailand. (Station info).

programme.title: NZ Jetsprint Championship 2025
programme.desc: The New Zealand Jetsprint Championship is the most important sprint boat competition from New Zealand, the country where the sport was founded in 1981. Jetsprinting is comparable to rally sports, but there is only one boat on the track at any given time and boats drive at very high speeds. The up to 500 HP strong jet sprint boats therefore try to achieve the best time on the tracks. (Senderinfo).

programme.title: UIM F1H2O World Powerboat Championship 2025
programme.desc: Curtain up for Formula 1 in motorboat racing: According to the world umbrella organization UIM, the H20 is the fastest outboard racing boat series in circuit racing and has been dominated by Philippe Chiappe for years. (Station info).

programme.title: FIM X-Trial World Championship 2026
programme.desc: The Fédération Internationale de Motocyclisme has organized the X-Trial World Championship annually since 1993. In contrast to the outdoor discipline, the X-Trail competitions take place indoors. (Station info).

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy 2025
programme.desc: Would Superstock racing become a blueprint for Superbike racing? With another dominant performance from Hicky? The experts didn't really agree on this. A race full of surprises and an interesting podium. (Station info).

programme.title: FIM Supermoto World and European Championship 2025
Red Bull Romaniacs
programme.desc: The Romaniacs have become a permanent highlight in the hard enduro community's calendar. After some riders were denied the meeting last year, it was now even more beautiful in Sibiu. (Station info).

programme.title: Icelandic Formula Offroad 2025
programme.desc: Formula Off Road was invented in Iceland. Hoping to raise more money for the Icelandic rescue teams, the teams began showing their 4WD cars in action in the Icelandic hills. (Station info).

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy 2026
programme.desc: With the first Supersport race shortened to 3 laps, the question was whether Hicky could once again demonstrate his dominance from the Superbike race, whether Lee Johnston could repeat his success from last year or whether Michael Dunlup would live up to his role as favorite here. It was a hot fight! (Station info).

programme.title: Belgian Rally Championship 2026
programme.desc: The Belgian Rally Championship is one of the most competitive rally championships at national level. This also attracts prominent guest starters such as Thierry Neuville, Craig Breen and Stéphane Lefebvre. (Station info).

programme.title: BTRDA Rallycross 2025
programme.desc: The races of the British Trial and Rally Drivers Association, which was founded in 1938, are highly competitive. The rallycross track with changing surfaces challenges the best drivers in the world. (Station info).

programme.title: Tour European Rally 2026
programme.desc: The Tour European Rally 2023 traditionally starts with the promo event in Finland. The 58th edition of the spectacular Arctic Lapland Rally offers pure action and excitement on the snow and ice slopes of Finland. (Station info).

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: Mercedes-Benz is the most successful automobile brand in motorsport. From the world's first car race in 1894 to today's Formula 1, Mercedes has been winning races all over the world for over 120 years. Whether Panamericana or Le Mans, DTM or Indianapolis, Silver Arrows or Formula 1, no other manufacturer has won as many races as Mercedes. The Mercedes racing drivers are always the greatest and most famous drivers of their time like Rudolf Carracciola, Juan Manuel Fangio or Lewis Hamilton. (Station info).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: In this episode, Eric van Lammeren tells the special story behind the recreation of the Bugatti Type 41 Royale prototype, which Ettore Bugatti used as a private vehicle for five years and which was considered lost for a long time after a crash. In the SML CarGroup showroom, Eric speaks to an audience with Thomas Hientz and presenter Martin Utberg about the background and fascination of this extraordinary project. Martin and Thomas are also traveling in a very special Mercedes-AMG PureSpeed. (Station info).

programme.title: Racing Files
programme.sub-title: McLaren – from Formula 1 to Can Am
programme.desc: McLaren is the second oldest active team in Formula 1 and now enjoys worldwide fame. However, when it was founded, hardly anyone would have expected that the team founded by New Zealand racing driver Bruce McLaren would develop into a heavyweight in the world of super sports cars and one of the best-known teams in motorsport. Racing Files tells the story of McLaren. (Station info).

programme.title: A&E
programme.desc: The West Midlands Ambulance Service is called to millions of emergencies every year. The operations are often so intense that treatment begins on the street. The team of dedicated doctors and paramedics has the daily task of saving lives. (Station info).

programme.title: Green wave

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: The Mitsubishi Lancer began its career in the World Rally Championship in 1993 as the Evolution I. Off the road he shows what he can do and with great success. In 1996, Tommi Mäkinen achieved five World Championship race victories with the EVO III and won the title.

programme.title: Tuning - it doesn't get any lower!
programme.desc: The sports and tuning trade fair 'Fighterama' is the annual meeting point for customizing and tuning.

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: Stunt coordinator Christoph Domanski tests the feasibility of an accident sequence for a new film shoot. A car is said to be overturned at an intersection by a beverage truck standing across it - including crates of beverages flying around. Locksmith Uwe, together with the stuntwomen Tina and Teresa, prepares the truck for the shooting, stuntman Nick pads the cage of his stunt car.

programme.title: Dumbest Stuff on Wheels
programme.desc: Sometimes people and machines don't make a good mix. Especially when it comes to operating very heavy or fast vehicles. The program shows video recordings that provide evidence.

programme.title: Made in....

programme.desc: Karim Al Azhari's passion is fast cars. He is a racing driver and president of the Porsche Club in the United Arab Emirates. Karim loves and lives luxury, but every now and then he is really stressed.

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.desc: Motorcycle riding fun is diverse. Some like retro, others look to the future. We test the Royal Enfield Shotgun 650 in an old-school look and reveal exciting facts about the Indian manufacturer with British roots.

programme.title: Super Cars
programme.desc: Which sports car fan doesn't secretly dream of a Porsche 911. It is THE sports car from Germany. Compact, iconic and stable in value. And that despite the fact that with over 1.3 million units it is one of the most produced sports cars of all time.

programme.title: Mission Mobility
programme.desc: Racing legend Hans Joachim Stuck says goodbye to active racing at the 24-hour race. He won the first 24-hour race here at the age of just 19 and therefore chose the Nürburgring for his farewell performance.

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy 2026
programme.desc: It was actually supposed to be the final day, but in the end only the super athletes and sidecars started, while the senior was postponed to the next day. However, history was written once again in the extremely competitive second super sports race.

programme.title: Made in....
programme.desc: Motorcycling can be a hobby or sport with an adrenaline rush, but it also carries risks. The fact that the number of deaths in motorcycle accidents in Germany is falling is due, among other things, to the constant improvement of crash helmets. The helmet manufacturer Schuberth in Magdeburg plays a large part in these life-saving developments. Around 350 employees manufacture all kinds of protective helmets here.

programme.title: Green wave
programme.desc: Today's cars are developing into completely networked digital devices. Road safety is expected to improve significantly in the future. The responsible engineers from Daimler provide insights into their work.

Whether Bentley, Rolls-Royce or Jaguar, built with the most expensive materials, English limousines combine timeless luxury, unique comfort and superior power.

programme.title: Crash

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: The world's largest racing event for historic vehicles is the Goodwood Revival in England. Over 150,000 fans flock to the country estate of the noble Earl of March. Visitors can expect many highlights such as the race for the Shelby Cup.

programme.title: Cars + Life
programme.desc: The Porsche Taycan has entered the Guinness Book of Records with a world record.

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: The Silver Arrows represent an unprecedented era of motorsport. They dominated the racing scene in the 1930s. Rudolf Caracciola, Hermann Lang, Juan Manuel Fangio and Stirling Moss are the heroes of that time.

programme.title: Nordschleife
programme.desc: Racing legend Jackie Stewart once described the Nordschleife of the Nürburgring as a multi-limbed monster and gave it the name Green Hell.

programme.title: Stunt Heroes

programme.desc: The program reports on a visit to the Oldtimer Gallery in Toffen, Switzerland.

programme.title: Trinity Is Still My Name

programme.title: You Cant Win Em All
programme.desc: As the Ottoman Empire collapses throughout Turkey in 1922, a number of adventurers from all over the world sign on to protect the locals from thieves and marauders--for a hefty price. Two such mercenaries are Adam and Josh, who are hired by provincial Turkish governor Osman. Adam and Josh are expected to protect their boss' gold shipment, and to provide safe conduct for Osman Bey's three daughters. Along the way, our 'heroes' decide to forget their mission and abscond with the gold, but their plans are foiled by their own inherent ineptitude--and by the bothersome interference of duplicitous Colonel Elci.

programme.title: The Worm Eaters

programme.title: Trinity Is Still My Name
programme.desc: Two brothers try to fulfill the promise they made to their dying father.

programme.title: You Cant Win Em All
programme.desc: As the Ottoman Empire collapses throughout Turkey in 1922, a number of adventurers from all over the world sign on to protect the locals from thieves and marauders--for a hefty price. Two such mercenaries are Adam and Josh, who are hired by provincial Turkish governor Osman. Adam and Josh are expected to protect their boss' gold shipment, and to provide safe conduct for Osman Bey's three daughters. Along the way, our 'heroes' decide to forget their mission and abscond with the gold, but their plans are foiled by their own inherent ineptitude--and by the bothersome interference of duplicitous Colonel Elci.

programme.title: Four-wheel drive adventure
programme.desc: S3 E31 — Episode 31This magazine deals with various off-road and all-wheel drive vehicles. It provides information about off-road veterans and cars with four-wheel drive. The vehicles are presented and their qualities are examined in more detail.

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: S1 — Porsche MotorsportThe Porsche brand is more successful than any other. It is considered particularly fast and reliable. It has always been successful in the big races, such as Le Mans, the Monte Carlo Rally or Formula 1.

programme.title: Green wave
programme.desc: E66 — Compact E-City RunaboutCompact, modern, electric! E-SUVs are conquering our big cities. Volvo is sending the EX30 to attract customers. The brand's new smallest model is supposed to impress with Swedish coolness and plenty of power.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: S1 E23 - Driving experienceIn the Ford Focus ST 5 tournament, it quickly becomes clear through spoilers, wide tires, painted brake calipers, ST logos and, above all, the centrally positioned exhaust pipe that it is not intended for family vacations.

programme.title: Crash
programme.desc: S1 E3 — Episode 3We see what happens when ambition exceeds driving ability and racing professionals are carried out of the curve. Breathtaking stunts by professional drivers and spectacular scenes in which no one is harmed are presented.

programme.title: Spotted
programme.desc: E21 — SEMA Las VegasIn the motherland of the V8, the craziest car show in the world is celebrated every year in Las Vegas. At SEMA, manufacturers, tuners and customizers from all over the world present their concept cars, visions and hand-finished automotive treasures.

programme.title: 4x4 - Das Allrad Magazin
programme.desc: S3 E73 — Commercial VehiclesWith 3.5 million units sold worldwide, the Mercedes Sprinter is one of the most popular commercial vehicles. In the third generation it is more modern than ever. The magazine tests the model on the streets around Amsterdam.

programme.title: Cars + Life
programme.desc: E11 — Episode 112019 celebrated Porsche 70 years of sports car history. For this occasion, it was decided to recreate a completely new vehicle of the type 993, the unique Project Gold, based on an existing original bodyshell.

programme.title: Tuning - it doesn't get any lower!
programme.desc: S3 E15 — Alfa Romeo 147 GTAAlfa Romeo's latest creation is a GTA version of the 147. The already pretty design of the 147 has been properly trimmed towards sportiness. Voluminous air inlets and outlets as well as bulbous wheel arches suit it very well.

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: S2 E11 — Alarm in the gravel pitA gravel pit becomes a stunt laboratory: The stunt heroes from Action Concept test for their favorite production "Alarm for Cobra 11". They send a motorcycle freestyle over a ramp and shoot themselves into the water with a specially built human catapult. They are also experimenting with a new system: This is designed to allow a prepared car to roll over several times in the sand at 70 km/h. Stuntwoman Tina takes over the job as driver.

programme.title: Dumbest Stuff on Wheels
programme.desc: S2 E11 — Episode 24Humans and machines sometimes don't make a good mix. Especially when it comes to operating very heavy or fast vehicles. The program shows video recordings that provide evidence.

programme.title: Made in....
programme.desc: S2 E7 — Knaus-TabbertThe Knaus Tabbert company from Jandelsbrunn is a manufacturer of luxury caravans and premium motorhomes. Alfred Tabbert produced the first caravan in series production as early as the 1950s. The next model followed in 1960.

programme.title: Mission Mobility
programme.desc: S2 E12 — Episode 25Tonga is a constitutional monarchy. Peter Goldstern was already in the service of George Tupou the 5th's father. He is now one of the king's closest confidants and is the only one allowed to fly the royal plane.

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.desc: S1 E32 — Electric Motorcycle Festival and Can-AmA cool rattling in your ears - that's how you know motorcycling. But the future could look or sound different, and quietly. Is this still ¿real¿ motorcycling or does the electric drive completely rob you of the emotion.

programme.title: Super Cars
programme.desc: S16 E233 — Fascination Mercedes S-ClassIt is considered the most successful luxury sedan in the world - a synonym for comfort and opulence - and sets standards in terms of technology and safety: The Mercedes S-Class. But why is that?

programme.desc: Episode 60Aimo from Kuusankoski goes hunting for criminals with a very special company car: a '76 Trabant L 601. Timo is a talented hobbyist and turned his 1963 Škoda Octavia sedan into an original pickup.
